records.ety: [Corrupt. fr. frolic, under the influence of roll.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Rollicked (-lkt); p. pr. & vb. n. Rollicking.]

defs: To move or play in a careless, swaggering manner, with a frolicsome air; to frolic; to sport; commonly in the form rollicking.
quotes: He described his friends as rollicking blades.
